source.paper: A Unified Newton Barrier Method for Multibody Dynamics
source.phase: Phase 6: CPU Scene Corpus And Py-Demos

classification_policy.gate: Rows move only when artifact, command, invariant, evidence path or PR, and limitation status are explicit.
classification_policy.visual_policy: Py-demo rows require headless smoke plus long-horizon capture commands before landing.
classification_policy.benchmark_policy: Performance rows require CPU benchmark/profile packet paths before landing.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced deformable cloth patch and static obstacle proxies stay finite while stepping through the deformable IPC World path.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced deformable-cloth/static-obstacle smoke packet only; rigid rings, deformable tori, rods, articulated ragdoll, cloth self-contact, and paper-scale mixed coupling remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: The py-demo now runs a reduced lying-flat scene through World::step, and bm-plan083-cpu-lying-flat-packet validates the reduced benchmark packet. Full paper body/node/contact counts and mixed rigid/deformable/rod/ragdoll coupling remain planned.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced bridge boards, point connections, and traveler stay finite while stepping through the rigid IPC World path.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced runtime smoke and CPU packet only; waiting for rod, rigid, and codimensional paper-scale coupling.
scenes.notes_or_gap: The py-demo now runs a reduced hanging-bridge scene through World::step, and bm-plan083-cpu-hanging-bridge-packet validates the reduced benchmark packet. Full paper body/node/contact counts remain planned.

scenes.expected_invariant: Pulley constraints satisfy residual tolerances and force-vs-mass comparison rows.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced hinged-wheel and point-connection smoke packet only; analytical force comparison and paper-scale rope/rod coupling remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: The py-demo now runs a reduced pulley scene through World::step, and bm-plan083-cpu-pulley-packet validates the reduced benchmark packet. Analytical force-vs-mass comparison remains planned.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced umbrella rod skeleton, hinge, and point-connected ribs stay finite while stepping through the rigid IPC World path.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced hinged-rib smoke packet only; cloth shrinking, wrinkling, sliding constraints, and paper-scale rod coupling remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: The py-demo now runs a reduced umbrella scene through World::step, and bm-plan083-cpu-umbrella-packet validates the reduced benchmark packet. Cloth and sliding-constraint reproduction remain planned.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced vehicle chassis, passive wheel hinges, and flat terrain contact stay finite and non-penetrating through the rigid IPC World path.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced chassis/passive-wheel terrain smoke and CPU packet only; terrain mesh, navigation controls, and Table 2 timing remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: The py-demo now runs a reduced terrain vehicle scene through World::step, and bm-plan083-cpu-terrain-vehicle-packet validates the reduced benchmark packet. Full 10-body/34k-node paper reproduction remains planned.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced six-body ragdoll chain, revolute articulation rows, and flat-ground contact stay finite and non-penetrating through the rigid IPC World path.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced six-body revolute-chain smoke and CPU packet only; cone-twist joints, 60-ragdoll scale, and Table 2 timing remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: The py-demo now runs a reduced ragdoll scene through World::step, and bm-plan083-cpu-ragdoll-packet validates the reduced benchmark packet. Paper 60-ragdoll cone-twist scale remains planned.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced single-hinge nunchaku handle stays finite while stepping through the rigid IPC World path.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced single-hinge runtime smoke and CPU packet only; waiting for cone-twist ranges and N-by-N scaling.
scenes.notes_or_gap: The py-demo now runs a reduced nunchaku hinge scene through World::step, and bm-plan083-cpu-nunchaku-packet validates the reduced benchmark packet. Full cone-twist and scaling evidence remain planned.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced windmill hinge and falling-striker contact scene stays finite, non-penetrating, and constrained while stepping through the rigid IPC World path.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced hinge/contact smoke and CPU packet only; waiting for accepted Bullet/reference baseline packet, cube piles, and paper-scale timing.
scenes.notes_or_gap: The py-demo now runs a reduced windmill hinge/contact scene through World::step, and bm-plan083-cpu-windmill-packet validates the reduced benchmark packet. Bullet/reference comparison cannot land without a maintained baseline command.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced deformable cloth patch and static shell obstacle stay finite while stepping through the deformable IPC World path.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced deformable-cloth/static-shell smoke packet only; affine body packing, twisted shell, and cloth self-contact parity remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: The py-demo now runs a reduced candy scene through World::step, and bm-plan083-cpu-candy-packet validates the reduced benchmark packet. ABD primitive/oracle rows exist, but affine packing and paper-scale cloth self-contact remain planned.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced rolling-wheel contact scene stays finite, non-penetrating, and spinning while stepping through the rigid IPC World path.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced rolling-wheel smoke and CPU packet only; angular-velocity sweep, rolling-contact model, and Table 2 timing remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: The py-demo now runs a reduced precession wheel scene through World::step, and bm-plan083-cpu-precession-packet validates the reduced benchmark packet. Paper angular-velocity sweep remains planned.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced CPU packet reports finite wall-time, body, contact, friction, articulation, solver-iteration, and equality-residual counters across the runnable reduced corpus rows.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced aggregate wall-time packet only; paper gradient, Hessian, contact-pair, CCD, linear-solve, CPU/GPU parity, and paper-scale scene timing breakdowns remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: bm-plan083-cpu-timing-breakdown-packet aggregates the reduced lying-flat, hanging-bridge, pulley, umbrella, nunchaku, terrain vehicle, ragdoll, windmill, candy, and precession runtime rows without claiming the paper Fig. 24 subphase breakdown.

scenes.expected_invariant: N-by-N nunchaku timing grows linearly for N = 20, 40, 60, 80, 100 at matched tolerances.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced independent-hinge scaling packet only; cone-twist ranges, coupled N-by-N contact, and paper-scale linear-growth claims remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: Shares the reduced nunchaku scene with Fig. 13; bm-plan083-cpu-nunchaku-scaling-packet validates sizes N = 20, 40, 60, 80, 100 through rigid IPC World::step without claiming paper-scale cone-twist scaling.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced Table 2 packet reports finite body, dynamic-body, contact, friction, articulation, solver-iteration, residual, and timing counters for runnable reduced rows.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced setup/statistics packet only; paper body/node/contact counts, paper timesteps, and paper timing rows remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: bm-plan083-cpu-table2-packet covers reduced lying flat, hanging bridge, pulley, umbrella, terrain vehicle, ragdoll, windmill, candy, and precession rows through World::step.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced ABD wrecking-ball packet reports a valid two-body affine point-triangle runtime step, convergence, active barrier, objective decrease, and velocity updates.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced two-body affine point-triangle runtime-step packet only; 14k-triangle wrecking-ball assets, rigid IPC comparison timing, and paper-scale reproduction remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: bm-plan083-cpu-abd-wrecking-ball-packet exercises the internal ABD pair runtime-step helper for one reduced dynamic point-triangle impact; it is not the paper-scale wrecking-ball asset or rigid IPC comparison row yet.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced ABD cards packet reports valid affine point-triangle runtime steps, convergence, active barriers, objective decrease, and velocity updates.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced affine point-triangle runtime-step packet only; card-stack assets, rigid IPC comparison timing, and paper-scale house-of-cards reproduction remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: bm-plan083-cpu-abd-cards-packet exercises the internal ABD runtime-step helper for a reduced eight-card contact packet; it is not a paper-scale card-stack or rigid IPC comparison row yet.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced ABD 8-pair chain-net packet reports valid dynamic affine point-triangle runtime steps, convergence, active barriers, objective decrease, and velocity updates.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced 8-pair affine chain-net runtime-step packet only; 63k-triangle chain-net assets, rigid IPC comparison timing, and paper-scale reproduction remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: bm-plan083-cpu-abd-chain-8-packet exercises the internal ABD pair runtime-step helper for eight generated dynamic point-triangle contacts; it is not the paper-scale 8x8 chain net or rigid IPC comparison row yet.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced ABD 16-pair chain-net packet reports valid dynamic affine point-triangle runtime steps, convergence, active barriers, objective decrease, and velocity updates.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced 16-pair affine chain-net runtime-step packet only; 445k-triangle chain-net assets, rigid IPC comparison timing, and paper-scale reproduction remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: bm-plan083-cpu-abd-chain-16-packet exercises the internal ABD pair runtime-step helper for sixteen generated dynamic point-triangle contacts; it is not the paper-scale 16x16 chain net or rigid IPC comparison row yet.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced ABD 96-pair chain-net packet reports valid dynamic affine point-triangle runtime steps, convergence, active barriers, objective decrease, and velocity updates.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced 96-pair affine chain-net runtime-step packet only; 12M-triangle chain-net assets, stress-machine policy, GPU packet, and paper-scale reproduction remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: bm-plan083-cpu-abd-chain-96-packet exercises the internal ABD pair runtime-step helper for ninety-six generated dynamic point-triangle contacts; it is not the paper-scale 96x96 chain-net stress benchmark yet.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced ABD gear packet reports valid generated affine point-triangle pair runtime steps, convergence, active barriers, objective decrease, and velocity updates.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced 28-pair ABD comparison runtime-step packet only; 2.5M-triangle gear assets, contact-force visualization, GPU parity, and paper-scale reproduction remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: bm-plan083-cpu-abd-gears-packet exercises the internal ABD pair runtime-step helper for generated gear-contact proxies; it is not the paper-scale gear benchmark or GPU speedup claim.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced small Bullet-comparison packet reports valid generated affine point-triangle pair runtime steps, convergence, active barriers, objective decrease, and velocity updates.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced 16-pair ABD comparison runtime-step packet only; 1.2k-triangle Bullet comparison asset and accepted Bullet/reference baseline command remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: bm-plan083-cpu-abd-bullet-small-packet records internal ABD runtime-step evidence but does not reproduce the deck Bullet timing baseline.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced medium Bullet-comparison packet reports valid generated affine point-triangle pair runtime steps, convergence, active barriers, objective decrease, and velocity updates.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced 48-pair ABD comparison runtime-step packet only; 3.5k-triangle Bullet comparison asset and accepted Bullet/reference baseline command remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: bm-plan083-cpu-abd-bullet-medium-packet records internal ABD runtime-step evidence but does not reproduce the deck Bullet timing baseline.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced large Bullet-comparison packet reports valid generated affine point-triangle pair runtime steps, convergence, active barriers, objective decrease, and velocity updates.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced 96-pair ABD comparison runtime-step packet only; 11k-triangle Bullet comparison asset and accepted Bullet/reference baseline command remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: bm-plan083-cpu-abd-bullet-large-packet records internal ABD runtime-step evidence but does not reproduce the deck Bullet timing baseline.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced ABD complex-geometry packet reports valid generated affine point-triangle pair runtime steps, convergence, active barriers, objective decrease, and velocity updates.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced 29-pair affine runtime-step packet only; 1.2M-triangle complex-geometry assets, contact-force visualization, and paper-scale reproduction remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: bm-plan083-cpu-abd-complex-geometry-packet records internal ABD runtime-step evidence but does not reproduce the deck complex-geometry scene.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced ABD/FEM packet reports valid affine pair runtime steps, a finite deformable IPC smoke step, active affine/deformable mixed candidate diagnostics, and a converged coupled affine/deformable contact micro-solve.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced affine runtime-step, deformable IPC smoke, and affine/deformable coupled contact micro-solve evidence only; full runtime affine/FEM coupling, 1.1M-triangle assets, and paper-scale reproduction remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: bm-plan083-cpu-abd-fem-coupling-packet records bounded ABD/FEM micro-solve evidence but does not run a full runtime affine/FEM World::step path or reproduce the deck timing.

scenes.expected_invariant: Every ABD demo-suite row has a launchable py-demo placeholder with explicit limitation text.
scenes.limitation_status: Launchable placeholders only; each real scene remains tied to its row-specific benchmark packet.
scenes.notes_or_gap: This aggregate row tracks category coverage, not a separate runtime scene.

scenes.expected_invariant: GPU acceleration is explicitly deferred to Phase 7 private parity and speed packets.
scenes.limitation_status: Not applicable to Phase 6 CPU scene corpus.
scenes.notes_or_gap: Phase 7 owns CPU/GPU parity, transfer timing, kernel timing, and speedup claims.
